description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with global image ubuntu:18.04 and stages build, configure, test, build-deployable-image, deploy. Add a build job that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/, runs only on master, tags, and merge requests, and executes the commands: docker build -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/dev-image:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" ., docker login --username=$CI_REGISTRY_USER --password=$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY, docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/dev-image:$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME". No caches, artifacts, or deployment steps are defined.
